body_txt: The villain (perhaps after already going into another One-Winged Angel form and still losing to the heroes) shape shifts into an ultimate Super Mode . So awe-inspiring is this new form the very skies weep blood , so terrifying that it combines the power of every monster , and the hero and his love kiss each other goodbye. Problem is, the new super form is a joke . This can be for a number of reasons, be it an unstable Power Source , some built-up side effects , incompatible Power Upgrading Deformities , or a "plain old" Super-Power Meltdown once the heroes poke him . The results ain't pretty. Much like a Fake Ultimate Mook , this boss goes down in three hits and goes into a Shapeshifter Swan Song and promptly keels over in an explosion of energy or guts . Hopefully not both. Hell, hopefully neither. Usually, this is a subversion of One-Winged Angel by making the enemy an Anti-Climax Boss , or it may have just been that the writers designed a monster form without a corresponding battle. Can be played for either pathos or comedy.
